name: shopmeskills--logistics-tracking
description: Track international packages by tracking number. Supports 3100+ carriers (China Post, DHL, FedEx, UPS, USPS, Yanwen, Cainiao, etc.) via 17track. Optional: set TRACK17_API_KEY for best results. Without a key, uses Playwright (headless browser) as fallback. Use when the user asks about package tracking, shipment status, delivery time, or logistics queries.
